queries.question: Show all the photography pieces, also show all the paintings hosted at MoMA.
queries.sql:
SELECT VisualArt.Title 
FROM ArtType JOIN VisualArt ON ArtType.id = VisualArt.ArtTypeId JOIN ArtworkInExhibition ON VisualArt.id = ArtworkInExhibition.VisualArtId JOIN Exhibit ON ArtworkInExhibition.ExhibitId = Exhibit.id JOIN Gallery ON Exhibit.GalleryId = Gallery.id
WHERE ArtType.TypeName = "Photography" OR ArtType.TypeName = "Painting" AND Gallery.Name = "MoMA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?arttype a :ArtType .
  ?visualart a :VisualArt .
  ?visualart p:hasArtType ?arttype .
  ?artworkinexhibition a :ArtworkInExhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasVisualArt ?visualart .
  ?exhibit a :Exhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasExhibit ?exhibit .
  ?gallery a :Gallery .
  ?exhibit p:hasGallery ?gallery .
  ?visualart p:Title ?title .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?gallery p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typename_w) = "Photography" || (STR(?typename_w2) = "Painting" && STR(?name_w) = "MoMA")))
}

queries.question: Display all photographs and paintings exhibited at the MoMA.
queries.sql:
SELECT VisualArt.Title 
FROM ArtType JOIN VisualArt ON ArtType.id = VisualArt.ArtTypeId JOIN ArtworkInExhibition ON VisualArt.id = ArtworkInExhibition.VisualArtId JOIN Exhibit ON ArtworkInExhibition.ExhibitId = Exhibit.id JOIN Gallery ON Exhibit.GalleryId = Gallery.id
WHERE (ArtType.TypeName = "Photography" OR ArtType.TypeName = "Painting") AND Gallery.Name = "MoMA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?arttype a :ArtType .
  ?visualart a :VisualArt .
  ?visualart p:hasArtType ?arttype .
  ?artworkinexhibition a :ArtworkInExhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasVisualArt ?visualart .
  ?exhibit a :Exhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasExhibit ?exhibit .
  ?gallery a :Gallery .
  ?exhibit p:hasGallery ?gallery .
  ?visualart p:Title ?title .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?gallery p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typename_w) = "Photography" || STR(?typename_w2) = "Painting")) && STR(?name_w) = "MoMA"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display all photographs and paintings exhibited at the MoMA.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?arttype a :ArtType .
  ?visualart a :VisualArt .
  ?visualart p:hasArtType ?arttype .
  ?artworkinexhibition a :ArtworkInExhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasVisualArt ?visualart .
  ?exhibit a :Exhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasExhibit ?exhibit .
  ?gallery a :Gallery .
  ?exhibit p:hasGallery ?gallery .
  ?visualart p:Title ?title .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?gallery p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typename_w) = "Photography" || (STR(?typename_w2) = "Painting" && STR(?name_w) = "MoMA")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?arttype a :ArtType .
  ?visualart a :VisualArt .
  ?visualart p:hasArtType ?arttype .
  ?artworkinexhibition a :ArtworkInExhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasVisualArt ?visualart .
  ?exhibit a :Exhibition .
  ?artworkinexhibition p:hasExhibit ?exhibit .
  ?gallery a :Gallery .
  ?exhibit p:hasGallery ?gallery .
  ?visualart p:Title ?title .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?arttype p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?gallery p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typename_w) = "Photography" || STR(?typename_w2) = "Painting")) && STR(?name_w) = "MoMA"))
} }
}
